spec_line: 180 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Bird Eye Knit Fabric
description_blocks: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton high visible, knit fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim Bird Eye is used for ultra durable t-shirts.

180 g/m² , 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Bird Eye Knit Fabric

50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton high visible, knit fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user. ArGiyim Bird Eye is used for ultra durable t-shirts.
